name: yt-scribe
description: Use yt-scribe to fetch YouTube transcripts and polish them with Codex or OpenCode.

interface.longDescription: YT Scribe adds a companion skill for the yt-scribe CLI, which fetches YouTube captions and uses Codex or OpenCode to polish transcripts into notes, summaries, cleaned text, or article-style prose.
defaultPrompt: Turn this YouTube link into notes.
Polish this transcript into a summary.
